title: Prediction: ServiceNow Stock Will Soar After Earnings if It Delivers on This AI Metric
excerpt: ServiceNow has been cut nearly in half over the past year, but one AI metric reporting tonight could flip the entire recovery thesis in a single session.
content_html:
Vandita Jadeja

Wed, July 22, 2026 at 11:15 AM CDT 5 min read

Quick Read

  • NOW trades at $102 with our $332 BUY target implying 225% upside if Now Assist confirms its raised $1.5 billion AI revenue run rate tonight.

  • ServiceNow's 21% subscription growth towers over Salesforce (CRM), and its 7.73x price-to-sales looks undervalued next to Palantir's (PLTR) far richer AI multiple.

  • Bill McDermott raised Now Assist's AI commit from $1 billion to $1.5 billion, with multi-product deals growing nearly 70% year-over-year last quarter.

  • Act now: the analyst who called NVIDIA in 2010 just named his top 10 AI stocks — and ServiceNow didn't make the cut. Grab the names FREE today.

ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) reports Q2 2026 earnings after the close today, July 22, 2026, and the setup is binary. The stock has been cut roughly in half over the past year, but management raised its Now Assist AI revenue target from $1 billion to $1.5 billion on the Q1 call. If tonight's update confirms that trajectory, the recovery thesis gains real teeth.

ServiceNow ranks among the more contested turnaround setups in enterprise software right now. Our 24/7 Wall St. price target for ServiceNow is $331.60 over the next 12 months, implying 224.9% upside from $102.06. The recommendation is buy, with confidence at 90%. That is aggressive relative to the Street's $141.64 consensus.

24/7 Wall St. Price Target Summary

A Brutal Year, but a Turning Tape

ServiceNow trades 46.84% below where it did a year ago and 33.38% below the December 31 close, sitting 33% from the 52-week high of $210.20. Momentum has flipped. The stock is up 7.39% over the past month, and Reddit sentiment jumped from bearish to a peak Very Bullish reading of 82 around a viral r/stockmarket thread charting 14 years of free cash flow per share.

Act now: the analyst who called NVIDIA in 2010 just named his top 10 AI stocks — and ServiceNow didn't make the cut. Grab the names FREE today.

Q1 2026 validated the AI thesis. Subscription revenue hit $3.671 billion, RPO reached $27.7 billion, and non-GAAP operating margin printed 32%. Now Assist deals over $1 million grew more than 30% year-on-year, and Sales CRM net new ACV grew more than 5x.

Why Bulls See a Breakout Ahead

The bull case is the AI monetization curve. Bill McDermott put it plainly on the Q1 call: "We had a goal to be $1 billion on our AI commit this year, as you know. And I think we might have understated that a little bit. We're already talking about $1.5 billion now, and it's on a run."

content_html_zh:
万迪塔·贾德贾

2026 年 7 月 22 日星期三上午 11:15 CDT 阅读时间 5 分钟

快速阅读

  • NOW 的交易价格为 102 美元，我们的买入目标为 332 美元，这意味着如果 Now Assist 确认今晚其筹集的 15 亿美元人工智能收入运行率，则上涨 225%。
  • ServiceNow 21% 的订阅增长率高于 Salesforce (CRM)，其 7.73 倍的市销率与 Palantir (PLTR) 的 AI 倍数相比显得被低估。
  • Bill McDermott 将 Now Assist 的 AI 承诺从 10 亿美元提高到 15 亿美元，上季度多产品交易同比增长近 70%。
  • 立即行动：2010 年给 NVIDIA 打电话的分析师刚刚列出了他心目中的十大人工智能股票，而 ServiceNow 却没有上榜。 今天免费获取名字。

ServiceNow（纽约证券交易所代码：NOW）于今天（2026 年 7 月 22 日）收盘后报告 2026 年第二季度收益，并且设置是二进制的。 该股在过去一年中已大致下跌一半，但管理层在第一季度电话会议上将 Now Assist AI 收入目标从 10 亿美元提高到 15 亿美元。 如果今晚的更新证实了这一轨迹，那么复苏论就获得了真正的支持。

ServiceNow 是目前企业软件领域最具争议的周转设置之一。 我们对 ServiceNow 未来 12 个月的 24/7 华尔街目标价为 331.60 美元，较 102.06 美元上涨 224.9%。 推荐买入，置信度为 90%。 相对于华尔街一致认为的 141.64 美元，这一数字显得激进。

24/7 华尔街价格目标摘要

残酷的一年，但转折点

ServiceNow 的交易价格比一年前低 46.84%，比 12 月 31 日收盘价低 33.38%，较 52 周高点 210.20 美元低 33%。 势头已经逆转。 该股在过去一个月上涨了 7.39%，Reddit 情绪从看跌跃升到非常看涨的峰值，围绕着一条病毒式的 r/股市帖子，绘制了 14 年每股自由现金流图。

立即行动：2010 年给 NVIDIA 打电话的分析师刚刚列出了他心目中的十大人工智能股票，而 ServiceNow 却没有上榜。 今天免费获取名字。

2026 年第一季度验证了人工智能论文。 订阅收入达到 36.71 亿美元，RPO 达到 277 亿美元，非 GAAP 营业利润率为 32%。 Now Assist 超过 100 万美元的交易同比增长超过 30%，Sales CRM 净新 ACV 增长超过 5 倍。

为什么多头看到未来突破

牛市的情况是人工智能货币化曲线。 Bill McDermott 在第一季度电话会议上明确表示：“如您所知，我们今年的人工智能承诺目标是 10 亿美元。 我认为我们可能有点低估了这一点。 我们现在已经在谈论 15 亿美元了，而且它正在奔跑。”
